provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Parole Boards (Emblem) Regulations, 2006.

provisions.title: Application
provisions.content: These Regulations shall apply to all matters of the Board relating to the use of the emblem.

provisions.title: Interpretation
provisions.content: In these Regulations unless the context otherwise requires— “ Act ” means the Parole Boards Act ; [ Act No. 25 of 1994 ] “ Parole Board ” means the National Parole Board and the Regional Parole Board established under section 3 of the Act .
The Board shall, for the purposes of its business use the emblem indicated in the Schedule .
The emblem shall be used on such documents of the Board as determined by the Board.
Persons entitled to use the emblem may include: (a) Chairman; (b) Vice-Chairman; (c) Secretary; and (d) any such other person to whom the Board has delegated its functions.
No person shall use the emblem in any business without the written consent or permission of the Board.

Any person who contravenes the provisions of these Regulations commits an offence and shall, upon conviction, be liable to a fine not exceeding five hundred thousand shillings or to a term of imprisonment not exceeding two years or both that fine and imprisonment.
